content.content:
{"body":"id: GO:0010241
name: ent-kaurene oxidation to kaurenoic acid
namespace: biological_process
def: "The three successive oxidations of the 4-methyl group of ent-kaurene to form ent-kaur-16-en-19-oate, kaurenoic acid. This process may be carried out entirely by the enzyme ent-kaurene oxidase." [GOC:tb]
comment: Note that this term was in molecular function but was moved to biological process as it represents three successive reactions.
synonym: "ent-kaurene oxidation to ent-kaur-16-en-19-oate" EXACT []
synonym: "ent-kaurene oxidation to ent-kaurenoate" EXACT []
synonym: "ent-kaurene oxidation to kaurenoic acid by ent-kaurene oxidase" EXACT []
is_a: GO:0033331 ! ent-kaurene metabolic process
relationship: has_part GO:0052615 ! ent-kaurene oxidase activity


I don't think this process merits its own BP term.
The "The three successive oxidations" described by this term are part of three different MetaCyc biosynthetic pathways:
[steviol biosynthesis](https://metacyc.org/pathway?orgid=META&id=PWY-7070)
[gibberellin A12 biosynthesis](https://metacyc.org/pathway?orgid=META&id=PWY-5034)
[gibberellin biosynthesis IV (Gibberella fujikuroi)](https://metacyc.org/pathway?orgid=META&id=PWY-5047)

GO:0010241 term has 2 EXP annotations:
UniProtKB:Q5Z5R4	CYP701A6	GO:0010241    ent-kaurene oxidation to kaurenoic acid	IDA	PMID:22487175	Oryza sativa subsp. japonica	UniProt	
UniProtKB:Q93ZB2	KO	GO:0010241    ent-kaurene oxidation to kaurenoic acid	IMP	PMID:9671797	Arabidopsis thaliana	TAIR

PMID:22487175 abstract says "The plant growth retardant uniconazole (UNI), which has been used as an effective inhibitor of ent-kaurene oxidase (CYP701A) involved in gibberellin biosynthesis..." though the paper only shows enzyme activity assays, and I don't see any evidence for a BP. Suggest that  GO:0010241  is just removed. 

PMID:9671797 abstract says "We present data showing that the ga3-1 mutant is deficient in ent-kaurene oxidase activity, the first cytochrome P450-mediated step in the gibberellin biosynthetic pathway"
So, I think the GO:0010241 annotation can be changed to "GO:0009686 gibberellin biosynthetic process"","comments":[{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABCSF5DA","author":{"login":"sjm41"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"@tberardini Do my proposals here sound OK to you?","createdAt":"2026-05-14T06:17:46Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/32078#issuecomment-4448155916","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABDN5c7Q","author":{"login":"tberardini"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"Sounds good, @sjm41. I've gone ahead and updated the annotations for AT5G25900 (KO).","createdAt":"2026-05-21T17:31:00Z","includesCreatedEdit":true,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[{"content":"THUMBS_UP","users":{"totalCount":1}}],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/32078#issuecomment-4510866669","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABDSYWDQ","author":{"login":"sjm41"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"Obsoletion reason is:
 - [ ] The reason for obsoletion is that the data from the paper for which the term was requested can be accurately described using [GO:0009686 gibberellin biosynthetic process].

content.content:
---
name: Obsoletion notice
about: This template is to notify ontology users of a term obsoletion.
title: 'Obsoletion notice: [GO ID: term label]'
labels: obsoletion
assignees: ''

---

Dear all, 

The proposal has been made to obsolete [GO ID: term label]. 
(keep one, remove others): 

* The reason for obsoletion is that the term is not clearly defined and usage has been inconsistent
*  The reason for obsoletion is that the meaning of the term is ambiguous.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term represents a GO-CAM model.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term represent an assay and not a real GO process. 
* The reason for obsoletion is that this represents a phenotype.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that the data from the paper for which the term was requested can be accurately described using [appropriate GO term] 
* The reason for obsoletion is that this term represents a gene product.
* The reason for obsoletion is that this term refers to a class of proteins.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term was added in error.
* The reason for obsoletion is that more specific terms were created.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that this term was an unnecessary grouping term.
* The reason for obsoletion is that is not known to be catalyzed by any gene product.
*  The reason for obsoletion is that it more specific than the specificity of any known gene product.
* The reason for obsoletion is that there is no evidence that this function/process/component exists.
* (or add other reason)

Annotations:
There are X experimental annotations to this term by (list of impacted groups and their respective numbers of EXP and ISS annotations). 
or: There are no experimental annotations to this term.

There are X InterPro2GO/UniRule/UniProtKW mappings to this term. 
or: There are no mappings to this term.

This term is included in the XXX subset(s).
or: This term is not present in any subset.

Annotations can be viewed here: [link to GitHub ticket in the go-annotation tracker].

If obsolete term has a 'replaced by' term: (optional)
This term is being replaced by [GO term] 

If obsolete term has a 'consider' term:  (optional)
Annotations can be transferred to [suggested GO term(s)] 

Any comments can be  added to the issue: [link to GitHub ticket in the go-ontology tracker]. 
Unless objections are received by [DATE], we will assume that you agree to this change.

Thanks, 

The GO-Ontology Editors

content.text: I have enough context. Let me draft the announcement email and post it as a comment on the issue.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/announcement.md << 'EOF'
Drafted announcement email below, following the [obsoletion notice template](https://github.com/geneontology/go-announcements/blob/master/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/obsoletion-notice.md) with unnecessary lines removed.

---

**Title:** Obsoletion notice: GO:0010241 ent-kaurene oxidation to kaurenoic acid

Dear all,

The proposal has been made to obsolete GO:0010241 ent-kaurene oxidation to kaurenoic acid.

* The reason for obsoletion is that the data from the paper for which the term was requested can be accurately described using GO:0009686 gibberellin biosynthetic process.

Annotations:
There are 2 experimental annotations to this term: 1 IDA from UniProt (UniProtKB:Q5Z5R4, *Oryza sativa subsp. japonica*) and 1 IMP from TAIR (UniProtKB:Q93ZB2, *Arabidopsis thaliana*). The TAIR annotation has already been updated to GO:0009686.

There are no InterPro2GO/UniRule/UniProtKW mappings to this term.

This term is not present in any subset.

This term is being replaced by GO:0009686 gibberellin biosynthetic process.

Annotations can be transferred to GO:0009686 gibberellin biosynthetic process.

Any comments can be added to the issue: https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/32078.
Unless objections are received by [DATE], we will assume that you agree to this change.

Thanks,

The GO-Ontology Editors

---
🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**
- Model: `claude-opus-4-7`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @raymond91125
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/26465141442)
EOF
gh issue comment 32078 --body-file /tmp/announcement.md
input.description: Post drafted announcement email as comment on issue 32078

content.text:
Drafted the obsoletion announcement email and posted it as a comment on issue #32078.

Key details included:
- **Target term:** GO:0010241 ent-kaurene oxidation to kaurenoic acid
- **Reason (only one kept, per "remove unnecessary lines"):** data can be accurately described using GO:0009686 gibberellin biosynthetic process
- **Annotations:** 2 EXP (1 IDA UniProt, 1 IMP TAIR — TAIR already updated)
- **Mappings:** none
- **Subsets:** none
- **Replaced by / consider:** GO:0009686 gibberellin biosynthetic process
- **DATE** left as a placeholder for editors to fill in

Comment URL: https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/32078#issuecomment-4547082680
